rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS SCHRIER VS. DEAN NICOLACAKIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Dean And Maria Nicolacakis And (To The Extent Of Their Undivided Interest Therein) The 3282-3284 Jackson Street Homeowners Association For Order Amending The March 22, 2019 Judgment To Identify The Judgment Debtor As Douglas Schrier And That The Judgment Sum Against Him Is In The Amount Of $2,470,156.89
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 9, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANTs DEAN NICOLACAKIS and MARIA NICOLACAKIS's Motion (To The Extent Of Their Undivided Interest Therein) The 3282-3284 Jackson Street Homeowners Association For Order Amending The March 22, 2019 Judgment To Identify The Judgment Debtor As Douglas Schrier And That The Judgment Sum Against Him Is In The Amount Of $2,470,156.89 GRANTED as follows: (1) Defendant to prepare a form of judgment containing all the specifics locates in Ex. 2 to Warner Declaration; (2) form of judgment shall also specify that some of the listed amounts are subject to reimbursement; (3) within 10 days of entry of judgment Defendants must file and server a partial satisfaction of judgment; (4) within 10 days of final determination of cost of repair and move-out/alternative housing costs, Defendants must file a declaration specifying if any refund is due to Plaintiff and that such refund, if any, has been made or will be made by a date certain in accordance with Arbitration Award and/or HOA rules. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WENDY HOUGH ET AL VS. TODD COURAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Documents From Airbnb; Request For Sanctions Against Aibnb In The Amount Of $1,717
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 9, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFFs WENDY HOUGH and MATTHEW HRUDKA's Motion To Compel Documents From Airbnb; Request For Sanctions Against Aibnb In The Amount Of $1,717 Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LIZA SWIFT VS. LARRY SWIFT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Lof Motion, And Motion, To Substitute Paintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 9, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT's Motion To Substitute Paintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift continued to September 27, 2019. By no later than September 13, 2019 moving party to submit a supplemental brief addressing: (1) the outcome of Alameda Probate hearing; and (2) whether on the date of her death, Plaintiff, as individual (the only capacity in which this case was brought) had standing (i.e. ownership) to pursue this action in light of the alleged ownership transfer to the Trust (i.e. trustee becoming the real party in interest); (3) if Plaintiff had no standing in her individual capacity, was she properly in the case in her capacity as a trustee at the time of her death; (4) if Plaintiff had no standing at the time of her death, can her successor in interest become a new plaintiff in the case or substitution of plaintiff must be requested by other mean, e.g. CCP 367, 473. By no later than September 20, 2019 responding party may file a supplemental opposition addressing the issue listed above.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAISY DUARTE VS. NORMA ALMAZAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 9, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF DAISY DUARTE's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2619 MISSION I2, LLC VS. MILAGROS HERRERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment; Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 9, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANTs AURORA CIRERA, ARNANE MARTINEZ, ALIREN SUNGA, and RUBEN CALALO's Motion To Vacate Judgment DENIED. Defendants failed to meet their burden under CCP 473(b). No surprise, mistake of excusable neglect shown re: failure to tender May rent on time, or re-tender May and June rent between June 5, 2019 and June 19, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WWJW FAMILY LLC VS. TON KIANG RESTAURANT INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 9, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT TON KIANG RESTAURANT INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to state a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Verification is sufficient. = (501/CFH)
